# Nikhil — Portfolio (AI-native repository)

> A premium Next.js 15 + React 19 + TypeScript personal portfolio positioning
> Nikhil as a founder, product engineer, technical architect, and AI engineer.
> The repository is self-describing for AI agents: `/docs` is the canonical
> knowledge base and `.claude/`, `.cursor/`, `.ai/` form an AI operating system.

This site is statically prerendered on the Next.js App Router with Tailwind
(CSS-variable design tokens, dark/light themes), Framer Motion, a
react-three-fiber 3D hero, and a full quality gate (ESLint, Prettier, Vitest,
Husky, GitHub Actions → Netlify).

Key rules for any AI agent: update `/docs` before `/src`; use semantic color
tokens only (never literal white/zinc); don't redesign the visual identity; keep
the quality gate green; update `docs/governance/*` after changes.

## Start here

- [AI entry point](.claude/CLAUDE.md): primary instructions for AI agents
- [Knowledge base index](docs/README.md): canonical content + update contracts
- [Repo map](.ai/context/repo-map.md): where everything lives
- [README](README.md): human-facing overview and scripts

## Who & what

- [User context](.claude/USER_CONTEXT.md): Nikhil's identity, focus, goals
- [Project context](.claude/PROJECT_CONTEXT.md): purpose, stack, sections
- [Profile](docs/profile/): personal, contact, bio, achievements
- [Career](docs/career/): work experience, founder journey, timeline
- [Skills](docs/skills/): frontend, backend, databases, devops, ai, mobile, tools
- [Projects](docs/projects/): ConnectEdApp, Revize, Ignix UI + index

- [Architecture](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) and [ADRs](docs/architecture/architecture-decisions.md)
- [Coding standards](docs/architecture/standards.md)
- [Engineering principles](docs/architecture/engineering-principles.md)
